param.name: prefix
param.value: (ec:label('del-add'), ' ', string-join((ec:translate(add/@place, false(), false()), ', ', ec:translate(add/@type, false(), false())), ''), ec:colon())

param.name: alternate
param.value: (if (@rend) then (ec:translate(@rend, false(), true())) else (ec:label('del')), ' ', ec:translate(@hand, false(), false()))

param.name: prefix
param.value: (ec:label('del-add'), ' ', string-join((ec:translate(add/@place, false(), false()), ec:translate(add/@hand, false(), false()), ec:translate(add/@rend, false(), false()), ec:translate(add/@type, false(), false())), ' '), ec:colon())

param.name: alternate
param.value: (ec:label(if (@rend and @rend='rubbing') then 'rubbing' else 'del-gap'), ' (', gap/@quantity, ' ', ec:translate(gap/@unit, gap/@quantity > 1, false()), ')')

model.desc: Show text of del with popup and footnote

param.name: prefix
param.value: (ec:translate(@rend, false(), true()), if (@hand) then (' ', ec:translate(@hand, false(), false())) else (), ec:colon())

model.desc: Show text of del with popup and footnote
Show text of del with popup and footnote
